title: How would a Labour leadership contest work?
snippet: How could MPs who want to see Sir Keir Starmer replaced force a leadership contest?

title: Swapping Love Island for Eurovision: Antigoni's pride at representing Cyprus
snippet: Antigoni Buxton says appearing on the dating show was more "random" than her taking part in the song contest.

title: How worried should we be about hantavirus?
snippet: Passengers potentially exposed to hantavirus are being repatriated, so what is the risk to the wider public?

title: 'Door is open' for Canada to join Eurovision
snippet: Prime Minister Mark Carney has already floated the idea of Canada joining the song contest.

title: Israel's Eurovision entry 'shocked' by protests during semi-final show
snippet: Noam Bettan was met with a mixture of cheering, boos and chants as he performed in Vienna on Tuesday night.

title: Burnham to make bid to return as MP as pressure mounts on Starmer
snippet: Wes Streeting also resigns as health secretary, saying he has lost confidence in Sir Keir Starmer's leadership.

title: How controversial VAR calls have defined two title battles
snippet: England and Scotland have experienced two highly controversial VAR decisions in a matter of days which could help to decide who ends the season as champions.

title: Hundreds of comedians unpaid by one of UK's biggest comedy festivals
snippet: Leicester Comedy Festival says it is committed to paying comedians but waiting on money themselves.

title: Streeting resigns and criticises government's 'drift'
snippet: Streeting says he has lost confidence in Sir Keir Starmer and calls for a debate about "what comes next".

title: US Border Patrol chief Michael Banks resigns
snippet: "It's just time," he told Fox News, adding that his resignation is effective immediately.

title: UK alcohol deaths fall for first time since Covid pandemic
snippet: Experts say the “modest reduction” is “not cause for complacency”, with calls to redouble efforts to slash deaths further.

title: French national shows symptoms on return from hantavirus-hit ship
snippet: Five passengers of the MV Hondius will be quarantined in Paris "until further notice", France's prime minister says.

title: Angela Rayner settles tax bill with HMRC
snippet: Rayner stood down as deputy prime minister in September 2025 after admitting underpaying stamp duty.

title: War criminal Ratko Mladić's jail release request denied
snippet: A UN judge admits the 84-year-old is "in the final stages of his life", but says prison conditions in The Hague ensure his maximum comfort.

title: Analysis: Andy Burnham's route back to the Commons is clearer - but one big hurdle remains
snippet: The Greater Manchester mayor faces a messy and bitter by-election battle with Reform UK.
